title: Browse explore page with trending tags and suggested users

acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows trending tags
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see a list of trending tags

acceptance_criteria.title: Explore page shows suggested users
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to the explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see a list of suggested users with their display names and bios

title: Filter explore posts by clicking a tag

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking a tag filters the posts list
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the explore page
When I click a tag
Then the tag should appear as active and filtered posts should be shown

acceptance_criteria.title: Clicking the active tag deselects it
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I have clicked a tag on the explore page
When I click the same tag again
Then the tag should no longer be active

title: View home feed with posts and author info

acceptance_criteria.title: Home feed shows posts with author info
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then I should see a list of posts with author names and post content

acceptance_criteria.title: Posts show engagement counts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home feed
When the page loads
Then I should see like and repost counts on posts

acceptance_criteria.title: Like button toggles liked state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I click the like button on a post
Then the like button should show an active state

acceptance_criteria.title: Like count updates on toggle
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I have liked a post
When I click the like button again
Then the like button should return to inactive state

acceptance_criteria.title: Bookmark button toggles bookmarked state
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I click the bookmark button on a post
Then the bookmark button should show an active state

title: Load more posts in the feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Load more button loads additional posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed with paginated posts
When I click the load more button
Then additional posts should appear in the feed

title: Compose and publish a new post

acceptance_criteria.title: Composer allows typing and submitting a post
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I type in the composer and submit
Then the new post should appear at the top of the feed

acceptance_criteria.title: Submit button is disabled when composer is empty
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed with an empty composer
When the page loads
Then the submit button should be disabled

title: Toggle between dark and light theme

acceptance_criteria.title: Theme toggle button switches the theme
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on any page
When I click the theme toggle button
Then the page theme should switch between light and dark

acceptance_criteria.title: Dark mode applies dark class to document
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home page in light mode
When I click the theme toggle
Then the html element should have the dark class applied

title: See the meta banner explaining the demo on every page

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is visible on home page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the home page
When the page loads
Then I should see the meta banner with links to the scaffold artifacts

acceptance_criteria.title: Meta banner is visible on explore page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I visit the explore page
When the page loads
Then I should see the meta banner

title: Navigate between home feed, explore, and search

acceptance_criteria.title: Navigation bar contains links to all main sections
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on any page
When I look at the navigation bar
Then I should see links to Home, Explore, and Search

acceptance_criteria.title: RootSpec version is shown in the header
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on any page
When I look at the navigation bar
Then I should see the RootSpec version badge

title: View user profile with bio and post history

acceptance_criteria.title: Profile page shows user info and posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a user profile page
When the page loads
Then I should see the user display name, handle, bio, follower counts, and their posts

title: Follow and unfollow a user from their profile

acceptance_criteria.title: Follow button follows a user
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am viewing a user profile I am not following
When I click the follow button
Then the button should change to show I am following

acceptance_criteria.title: Unfollow button unfollows a user
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am viewing a user I am now following
When I click the follow button again
Then the button should return to the unfollow state

title: Click an author name on a post to navigate to their profile

acceptance_criteria.title: Author name on post card links to profile page
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the home feed
When I see a post card
Then the author name should be a link to the author profile

title: Search posts by keyword and see matching results

acceptance_criteria.title: Typing a query returns matching posts
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page
When I type a keyword that matches post content
Then I should see matching posts in the results

acceptance_criteria.title: Results are empty for an empty query
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page with no query entered
When the page loads
Then no results should be shown

title: See empty state message when search returns no results

acceptance_criteria.title: No-results message appears for unmatched query
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I am on the search page
When I type a query that does not match any post
Then I should see a no-results message

title: View post detail showing full content and replies

acceptance_criteria.title: Post detail page shows post content and author
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post detail page
When the page loads
Then I should see the post content and author information

acceptance_criteria.title: Post detail page shows replies when they exist
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post that has replies
When the page loads
Then I should see the replies section with reply content

title: View post thread showing parent post when viewing a reply

acceptance_criteria.title: Reply post shows parent post above it
acceptance_criteria.narrative:
Given I navigate to a post that is a reply to another post
When the page loads
Then I should see the parent post displayed above the reply
